form.formComment: Two back was well beaten into fifth behind Elegant Stride at this track over 1720m in a NR up to 48 on April 2 at $21. Then a handy effort when beaten by 3.5 m finishing second after a quick start, behind My Ultimate Sassy at this track over 2125m in a NR up to 47 on April 9 at $23. Has wining claims from the inside draw.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Inconvenienced racing around the first turn when Peppi Gratz galloped.

form.formComment: Improved last start with a solid effort when 3rd (Fr5) over 2125m after showing early speed at this track was 4th-12.63 at the bell, beaten 10 m by My Ultimate Sassy (2:38.20) in NR up to 47 on April 9 at $31. Can improve. Draws for another good showing.

form.formComment: First up. At the last run she was driven from back in the field when 6th (Fr6) over 1720m at this track beaten 18 m by Bellamys Blast (2:06.20) in 3yo 1 WIN on February 12 at $1.70. Can open the campaign with a forward performance.

form.formComment: Didn't do much last start, 5th (Sr1) over 2125m at this track was 9th-23.91 at the bell, beaten 13 m by My Ultimate Sassy (2:38.20) in NR up to 47 on April 9 at $23. Before that 6th (Fr4) over 1720m after showing early pace at this track beaten 45 m by Elegant Stride (2:04.10) in NR up to 48 on April 2 at $26. Has the job ahead.

form.formComment: Comes here second-up after a month. Lacklustre first-up performance when 9th (Sr3) over 1740m at Bankstown beaten 65 m by The Best Of You (2:11.20) in NR up to 52 on March 16 at $31. Hard to have.

form.trainerName: D A MCDOWELL, K L MCDOWELL

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Gave ground and tired significantly over the concluding stages.
Promoted to second place outright after being checked at the 100m.
Broke gait during the score up however was in position at the start.
Held up rounding the home turn and in the early part of the straight.

form.formComment: Last start 5th (Fr4) over 1720m at this track beaten 30 m by Stannum (2:06.00) in MAIDEN on April 2 at $18. Two runs back 8th (Fr1) over 1720m after showing early speed at this track beaten 35 m by Shes A True Bling (2:07.50) in MAIDEN on March 26 at $1.85. Must do a lot more.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Approaching the 200m hung out and locked wheels momentarily with Tara Jim.

form.formComment: Last start 7th (Fr3) over 1720m at this track, beaten 25 m by Bettorleftalone (2:02.80) in NR up to 52 on April 9 at $18. Two runs back surrendered the lead and finished tired badly to finish 7th (Fr2) over 2240m after showing early speed at Goulburn well beaten by Where Back (2:43.30) in NR up to 53 on January 27 at $5.50. Will strip a lot fitter so watch for improvement.
